title: Income And Growth: Why EOG Resources Is One Of My Favorite Oil Plays For 2024
text: EOG Resources is positioned as a great long-term investment in the oil and gas sector, with a focus on low-cost basins and efficient operations. The company is set to return $4.1 billion to shareholders in 2023, representing 75% of its estimated free cash flow. EOG Resources has a strong balance sheet, consistent dividends, and an attractive valuation, making it a standout energy stock for potential success in 2024.
